title: ICIIP - 2019
content: ICIIP 2019 Proceedings available online @IEEEXplore ICIIP 2019 Conference Programme (Updated) Technical Programme Schedule for ICIIP 2019 (Updated) IEEE Conference Record number: #47207 IEEE Catalogue number: CFP1969N-PRT ; ISBN: 978-1-7281-0898-8 ( Print Version) IEEE Catalogue number: CFP1969N-DVD ; ISBN: 978-1-7281-0897-1 (DVD Version) IEEE Catalogue number: CFP1969N-ART ; ISBN: 978-1-7281-0899-5 (XPLORE COMPLIANT) Statistics of ICIIP 2019 Received total submissions: 550 Accepted submissions:  137 Acceptance rate: 25% Indexed at IEEEXplore:  112 No. of TPC members: 402 (from 58 different countries) Authors of selected and presented papers at ICIIP 2019 will be invited to resubmit their extended manuscripts (substantially revised, expanded and rewritten) for possible publication in: 1. Special  Issue on: " Recent Multidisciplinary  Research Advancements in Information Technology and Applied Management for  Sustainable Development , " International Journal of Applied  Management Science, Inderscience , USA (SCOPUS Indexed). 2. Call for Book Chapter(s):  “ Enabling  Technologies for Next Generation Wireless Communications ” CRC Press Taylor  and Francis group . (SCOPUS Indexed) 3. Call for Book Chapter(s): �Advancements in Security and Privacy Initiatives for Multimedia Images ,� IGI Global USA (SCOPUS Indexed) 4. Call for Book Chapter(s): �Large-Scale Data Streaming, Processing, and Blockchain Security ,� IGI Global USA (SCOPUS Indexed) SCOPUS Indexing of previous ICIIPs SJR H-Index=13 SJR H-Index=8 SJR H-Index=6 The  ICIIP (International Conference on Image Information Processing) conference has  been a biennial Conference at Jaypee University of Information Technology,  Waknaghat, Solan, H.P., India since 2011 with sponsorship of IEEE. The  conference has become a platform for Computer Science researchers  from   India  and  abroad   to  exchange  research   results  and  ideas   on  the foundations  and   applications  of  Image Processing and related areas. The area of Imaging Science and Image Computing  has grown enormously in the past decade with wide ranging applications  encompassing multiple disciplines of Computer Science & Technology,  Information Systems, Information Theory & Sciences, Artificial  Intelligence, Cognition, Cybernetics, Medical Sciences, Mathematics, Physics  and Psychology. It is primarily concerned with the process of Image generation,  Visualization, Structuring of large real life image data and Analysis for  classification, prediction based on machine learning, behavioral analysis and  virtualization. From the perspective of computer science and information  technology, the subareas of Image Processing, Computer Vision, Image security  & forensics, Pattern recognition and Computer Graphics form the core areas  and the Fifth  International Conference on  Image Information Processing (ICIIP 2019)   is being organized by and being held   at  JUIT Waknaghat, Solan, H.P.,  India during  November   2019 ,    will cover all of these core areas.    This time, theme of  the conference is ‘ Image Processing in Social Media ’. However, ICIIP 2019  solic its original papers contributions in all of the related areas. The topics  listed under each of these core areas is not meant to be exhaustive. Conference proceedings that meet IEEE quality review standards may be eligible for inclusion in the IEEE Xplore Digital Library. IEEE reserves the right not to publish any proceedings that do not meet these standards. Conference related communications such as conference website, email, direct mail solicitation, etc. may not reference or guarantee inclusion in the IEEE Xplore Digital Library. The objective of the conference is to bring together researchers in the academic institutions and R&D Research Labs, working in the related fields and to use this as a forum to exchange views and ideas in these topics of current research. Technical Tracks : Image Processing Computer Graphics Pattern Recognition Computer Vision Image Security & Forensics Important Dates Full paper Submission Deadline : Paper Submission has been closed Acceptance Notification Deadline: September 25, 2019 Conference Registration Deadline: October 10, 2019 October 20, 2019 [CLOSED] Camera-Ready Manuscript Deadline: October 15, 2019 October 20, 2019 [CLOSED] Conference Dates: November 15-17, 2019 Organized by Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat, District Solan, Near Shimla, Himachal Pradesh, INDIA www.juit.ac.in
